name: quoin-mcp
description: MCP server exposing USML 2026.05 reference implementation (Quoin) patterns, aesthetic packs, and templates as resources for AI coding agents. Exposes 38 catalog items: 22 production patterns + 4 content primitives + 6 layout primitives + 3 aesthetic packs + 3 templates.

resources.description: Each Quoin pattern, aesthetic pack, and template is exposed as an MCP resource. Resource URIs use the `quoin://` scheme.

find_pattern.description: Search the Quoin catalog by name or description substring. Returns matching pattern/aesthetic/template names with their URIs.
